blueprints.name: Code Reviewer
blueprints.description: Performs a thorough code review of a GitHub pull request or local diff. Analyzes the changes for bugs, security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and style problems, then produces structured, actionable feedback organized by severity.
blueprints.author: nanoclaw

blueprints.name: Git Rescue
blueprints.description: Diagnoses and recovers troubled Git repositories. Analyzes the current repo state to detect common problems — merge conflicts, detached HEAD, diverged branches, lost commits, corrupted index — and provides precise, step-by-step remediation instructions.
blueprints.author: nanoclaw

blueprints.name: Inbox Zero Bot
blueprints.description: Automatically triages your unread Gmail inbox each morning. Reads up to a configurable number of recent unread emails, categorizes them by urgency and action type, produces a concise summary, and suggests concrete next steps — helping you reach inbox zero without reading every message yourself.
blueprints.author: nanoclaw

blueprints.name: Morning Kickstart
blueprints.description: Starts your workday with a personalized briefing: pulls today's calendar events, optionally fetches the local weather forecast, and compiles your top priorities so you hit the ground running every morning.
blueprints.author: nanoclaw

blueprints.name: Weekly Snippets
blueprints.description: Compiles a weekly activity summary every Friday afternoon. Gathers git commits from the week, notable conversations, and completed tasks, then synthesizes a concise 'snippets' report suitable for standups, team wikis, or personal reflection.
blueprints.author: nanoclaw
